description: White Aryan Resistance (WAR) was a white supremacist and neo-Nazi organization in the United States, founded and formerly led by former Ku Klux Klan Grand Dragon Tom Metzger. It was based in Warsaw, Indiana, and described itself as an 'openly white-racist' organization. The group published a newspaper and produced a public-access cable television show. It is now defunct.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 1993, the group expanded into Canada .
country_links.context: The organization expanded into Canada, establishing a presence there.
